item.title: US strikes Iran after drone attack on cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz as Trump says Tehran violated ceasefire
item.description: The escalation has renewed fears over global shipping and oil and gas supplies.

item.title: Tax office’s warning as millions of Australians prepare to lodge returns
item.description: Doing this one thing can cause mistakes and lead to big delays.

item.title: Venezuelan earthquake kills more than 900 with thousands more missing or injured
item.description: More than 50,000 people have been reported missing after twin quakes struck.

item.title: Urgent warning as disease carried by cats linked to blindness and pregnancy issues
item.description: Experts estimate a half of the world’s population has come into contact with the parasite.

item.title: Brumby cull: Inside the fierce battle to protect or kill Australia’s feral horses
item.description: Helicopter culls, political pressure and clashing worldviews will collide again as one of the nation’s fiercest environmental fights is put back on the table.

item.title: Riverside Christian College’s 2024 dux never went to class. This is how they did it
item.description: Principal Michelle Gouge is the ultimate advocate for her school’s system, saying it bears little resemblance to what many Australians still imagine.

item.title: George Russell takes pole at Austrian GP despite yellow flag controversy as Oscar Piastri banks seventh
item.description: George Russell appeared to ignore stewards’ rulings before an investigation uncovered the truth.

item.title: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry’s plans to visit UK as family hits major security hiccup
item.description: A last-minute twist has cast doubt on Prince Harry’s plans to bring Meghan and their children back to the UK.

item.title: Mourning mother petitions for corrections order overhaul after her son was tragically killed
item.description: His mum holds onto the final three words he yelled out to her from his car as we went to hang out with friends.

item.title: Anzac Day Test confirmed, Bledisloe Cup to change
item.description: Rugby Australia and New Zealand Rugby have announced that a third Bledisloe Cup Test will be played on Anzac Day in Brisbane next year.

item.title: Omoggle: the website rating people’s faces based on their ‘perceived sexual market value’
item.description: Experts have sounded the alarm over extreme risks to young users' safety and mental health.

item.title: Middle East war: Iran attacks Bahrain and Kuwait following US strikes, threatens to halt talks
item.description: Efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz without Iran’s direct oversight sparked the crossfire now gripping the region.

item.title: A system that was designed to help veterans became part of the problem. Now it is being overhauled
item.description: From spouses to children, the overhaul will also improve support for the people who stand beside veterans every day.

item.description: ‘It has been in testing for a while now.’

item.description: ‘It was clear the impact had been too violent for there to be any survivors.’

item.description: The England captain has announced his retirement during a Test match, admitting the Ashes defeat broke him.

item.description: ‘And her actions spoke louder than words as she just led from the front.’

item.description: Fresh polling reveals Pauline Hanson’s popularity is slipping as Labor retakes the lead.

item.description: The Aussie was happy ‘on a personal level’ and expects it won’t be the last time he’s in the mix.

item.description: Delta has opened up about her decision to pause singing to compete in her next challenge.

item.description: The iconic Aussie star took aim at the One Nation leader after she labelled him an ‘essential’ figure of Australian monoculture.

item.description: The pair, who first met in 2013 at a house party, have reportedly been living ‘different lives’.

item.description: ‘I was so happy. It was just mental.’

item.description: A host of senior assistants are in the mix, but there is still a big ‘smoky’.

item.description: The end of the financial year is set to trigger huge money shake-ups — some helping your pocket and others not so much.

item.description: The motive for the incident in Stade, close to the port city of Hamburg, was not immediately clear.

item.description: The death toll from the country’s twin earthquakes has jumped to more than 1,700, as a 4.6-magnitude aftershock struck Caracas.

item.description: Petrol stations have been put on notice as prices drop to lower than they’ve been since the 2021 pandemic.

item.title: The tech bringing experts to the beds of regional patients where every minute can mean life or death
item.description: ‘We know that regional Australians are 17 per cent more likely and have higher risk factors. So getting that specialist care is critical.’

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Investigation launched after home peppered with bullets in Sydney
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Lethal Weapon star Danny Glover reveals Alzheimer's diagnosis
item.description: ‘I don’t feel like it’s the end of my life. There’s work to do. I still have my daughter, I have friends. I want to just say, your life continues.’

item.title: Harry Kane to the rescue as England survive World Cup scare against DR Congo
item.description: ‘What chance have you got?’

item.title: NSW road work speed limit rules changed
item.description: Crews at road work locations in NSW are now required to remove speed limit reduction signs, if it's safe to do so, when the sites are not being worked on.

item.title: Teenage duo arrested after 15-year-old boy stabbed to death in Melbourne
item.description: CPR was performed on the boy, but he died at the scene.

item.title: Nick Kyrgios unlikely to return to Wimbledon after doubles match with Alexander Bublik falls flat
item.description: It was not a great day for the combustible Aussie who had plenty of advice for the umpire.

item.title: Daredevil couple climbs Empire State Building in wild proposal
item.description: Shocking video captures the moment the duo unfurled a huge peace banner while perched atop the iconic New York skyscraper.
